title: thymus pallidus subsp. eriodontus
intro: Thymus pallidus subsp. eriodontus, also known as the 'Pallid Thyme', is a subspecies of the Thymus genus, a type of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its antimicrobial and antiseptic properties, which can help to fight off infections and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Thymus pallidus subsp. eriodontus include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve respiratory issues, and even possess anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions, teas, or tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
